overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban environment. The player moves from an open plaza with holographic floor displays, under a massive concrete overpass, alongside a busy multi-lane road with futuristic vehicles, and finally enters a luxury building featuring an indoor garden atrium with trees and water features.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with holographic floor display

events.description: character in white jacket runs directly toward the camera across the plaza
approaching and entering the covered area beneath the yellow overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across a futuristic plaza featuring a glowing blue holographic grid on the ground

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket and dark pants running toward the camera

entered.detail: large illuminated blue grid pattern embedded in the plaza floor with glowing white symbols
massive curved yellow bridge structure spanning across the plaza with black stripes
tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide-open urban plaza at night, dominated by a glowing blue holographic floor display. The camera moves forward toward a massive yellow overpass structure in the distance, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the background. A character in a white jacket runs toward the camera before the scene transitions into the covered area beneath the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

events.description: two pedestrians pass close by on the left, temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered corridor with massive concrete pillars and vertical cyan lighting

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking side by side, one with distinctive green hair and red pants

entered.detail: massive dark rectangular columns with vertical cyan light strips
underside of the curved yellow bridge forming a tunnel-like ceiling

segments.scene_description: Moving under the overpass, the environment becomes a semi-covered walkway with massive concrete pillars illuminated by vertical cyan light strips. The ceiling is formed by the underside of the yellow overpass structure. Two pedestrians with distinctive clothing pass by on the left as the camera continues forward through the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane road under overpass with moving traffic

events.description: futuristic vehicles begin passing by on the adjacent road
large blue armored truck passes close by on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking alongside a busy road with futuristic cars and trucks passing by under the overpass

notable_agents.action: large blue armored truck with glowing headlights driving past
futuristic black sedan with red taillights moving along the road

entered.detail: wet asphalt road with white lane markings reflecting neon lights
yellow and black striped metal railing separating walkway from traffic
various cyberpunk-style cars with sleek designs and glowing accents

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a roadside area under the overpass with moderate traffic. The camera walks alongside a multi-lane road where futuristic vehicles including a large blue truck and sleek black sedans drive past. The ground is wet asphalt reflecting the neon lights, separated from the pedestrian walkway by a yellow and black striped barrier.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury building lobby with indoor garden and water features

events.description: ascending stairs and entering the glass-fronted building
transitioning from urban exterior to indoor garden atrium with trees

agents.ego_description: ascending stone stairs and entering a modern building with glass walls and indoor vegetation

entered.detail: modern building facade with large glass panels and wide stone stairs
tall illuminated digital billboards displaying product advertisements
large mature trees growing inside illuminated hexagonal planters
reflective pools and water elements surrounding the indoor garden

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to a luxury building with large vertical advertising banners. The camera ascends stone stairs and enters through the glass facade into an indoor atrium. Inside, the environment transforms into a serene indoor garden with large trees in illuminated planters, water features, and modern glass architecture, contrasting sharply with the urban exterior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit urban plaza into the serene, sheltered interior of a luxury garden atrium. It begins by gliding across a wide plaza dominated by a glowing blue holographic floor, moving toward a massive yellow overpass as a character in a white jacket runs past. As the camera passes beneath the structure, the open sky is replaced by a semi-covered walkway of concrete pillars illuminated by vertical cyan light strips. The scene then shifts toward a roadside area where futuristic vehicles drive over wet, reflective asphalt, separated from the path by a striped yellow and black barrier. Finally, the camera ascends stone stairs and passes through a glass facade, leaving the noisy city behind to enter a quiet indoor atrium featuring illuminated planters, large trees, and tranquil water features.
